title: Sucat Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Sucat with a Z-Score of +3.43. Temperatures are extremely high, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sucat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Z-Score of +3.43, indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The relative humidity is at 80%, and wind speed is 2.8 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing the intense heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Sucat.
